name: Global Digital Creations Holdings Limited
summary: Global Digital Creations Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the computer graphic (CG) creation and production, and property leasing and building management services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The CG Creation and Production segment is involved in the production of television series, movies, and animated films; digital virtual human; and box office receipts. This segment also holds copyrights of original animated films and animated television series. The New Cultural Space provides property leasing and building management services. The company also provides administration and management services; invests in animation business; and develops multimedia software and hardware, as well as offers related technical consultancy services. Global Digital Creations Holdings Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
